expectations.evidence: Baseline agent explored the filesystem and found union-link.cjs at the skill path, used it correctly. Note: this is filesystem-aware general agent, not pure zero-knowledge baseline.
States '编辑 skills/ 下的文件会立即对所有 agent 生效，无需重新 sync'

notes: Baseline scored 4/4 because the agent has filesystem access and found the script by exploring the repo. This eval has low discriminating power — both pass. A true zero-knowledge baseline (no file access) would likely fail 'uses-union-link'.
